summary: Comprehensive testing completed for FireEye forest fire detection website. All major functionality tested including backend APIs, frontend pages, contact form, navigation, and user interactions.

minor_issues.impact: Email notifications not sent, but contacts are stored in database
minor_issues.workaround: Contact form works and stores data, only email sending is disabled

minor_issues.issue: FAQ accordion triggers not detected by automated test selectors
minor_issues.impact: Testing limitation - manual verification shows accordions work

passed_tests: Frontend hero section and CTA buttons
Frontend form submission and success handling
